column1: Among fruits, I like apples best.
column2: 果物の中でりんごが一番好きです。
column3: くだもののなかでりんごがいちばんすきです。
column4: 果物の中でりんごが一番好きです。
column5: 〜の中で〜が一番: superlative framing — X is the best/most among all Y

column1: Tanaka is the tallest in the class.

column1: Tokyo is the biggest city in Japan.

column1: Among sports, soccer is the most interesting.

column1: Mom is the kindest in my family.
